'''鈭歞h-s-ng''' ('''dhasanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eright|eright]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eright|eright]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-s-ng
|-
! Lemma
| dhasanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhasangithi|dhasangithi]] || [[word:dhasangiji|dhasangiji]] || [[word:dhasangishi|dhasangishi]] || [[word:dhasangi|dhasangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasanguthuth|dhasanguthuth]] || [[word:dhasangujuj|dhasangujuj]] || [[word:dhasangushush|dhasangushush]] || [[word:dhasang|dhasang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasanguthu|dhasanguthu]] || [[word:dhasanguju|dhasanguju]] || [[word:dhasangushu|dhasangushu]] || [[word:dhasangu|dhasangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasangufuth|dhasangufuth]] || [[word:dhasangufuj|dhasangufuj]] || [[word:dhasangufush|dhasangufush]] || [[word:dhasanguf|dhasanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhasangethe|dhasangethe]] || [[word:dhasangeje|dhasangeje]] || [[word:dhasangeshe|dhasangeshe]] || [[word:dhasange|dhasange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasangothoth|dhasangothoth]] || [[word:dhasangojoj|dhasangojoj]] || [[word:dhasangoshosh|dhasangoshosh]] || [[word:dhasang|dhasang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasangotho|dhasangotho]] || [[word:dhasangojo|dhasangojo]] || [[word:dhasangosho|dhasangosho]] || [[word:dhasango|dhasango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasangofoth|dhasangofoth]] || [[word:dhasangofoj|dhasangofoj]] || [[word:dhasangofosh|dhasangofosh]] || [[word:dhasangof|dhasangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhasang忙th忙|dhasang忙th忙]] || [[word:dhasang忙j忙|dhasang忙j忙]] || [[word:dhasang忙sh忙|dhasang忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhasang忙|dhasang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasangathath|dhasangathath]] || [[word:dhasangajaj|dhasangajaj]] || [[word:dhasangashash|dhasangashash]] || [[word:dhasang|dhasang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasangatha|dhasangatha]] || [[word:dhasangaja|dhasangaja]] || [[word:dhasangasha|dhasangasha]] || [[word:dhasanga|dhasanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasangafath|dhasangafath]] || [[word:dhasangafaj|dhasangafaj]] || [[word:dhasangafash|dhasangafash]] || [[word:dhasangaf|dhasangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhasangasha|dhasangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhasangasha|godhasangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhasangasha|gokidhasangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhasangn眉sha|dhasangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhasangnkn眉sha|godhasangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasangn眉sha|gokidhasangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhasangsh毛sha|dhasangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhasangnksh毛sha|godhasangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhasangsh毛sha|gokidhasangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasangrosha|dhasangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasangnkrosha|godhasangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasangrosha|gokidhasangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasangmusha|dhasangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasangnkmusha|godhasangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasangmusha|gokidhasangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhasangsherasha|dhasangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhasangnksherasha|godhasangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhasangsherasha|gokidhasangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhasangasha|dhasangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhasangnkngasha|godhasangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhasangasha|gokidhasangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhasangyasha|dhasangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhasangnkyasha|godhasangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhasangyasha|gokidhasangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhasangyamasha|dhasangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhasangnkyamasha|godhasangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhasangyamasha|gokidhasangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhasangn眉sh毛sha|dhasangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhasangnkn眉sh毛sha|godhasangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhasangn眉sh毛sha|gokidhasangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasangn眉rosha|dhasangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasangnkn眉rosha|godhasangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasangn眉rosha|gokidhasangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasangn眉musha|dhasangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasangnkn眉musha|godhasangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasangn眉musha|gokidhasangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhasangsh毛n眉sha|dhasangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhasangnksh毛n眉sha|godhasangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasangsh毛n眉sha|gokidhasangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasangsh毛rosha|dhasangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasangnksh毛rosha|godhasangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasangsh毛rosha|gokidhasangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasangsh毛musha|dhasangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasangnksh毛musha|godhasangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasangsh毛musha|gokidhasangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhasangron眉sha|dhasangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhasangnkron眉sha|godhasangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasangron眉sha|gokidhasangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhasangrosh毛sha|dhasangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhasangnkrosh毛sha|godhasangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhasangrosh毛sha|gokidhasangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasangromusha|dhasangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasangnkromusha|godhasangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasangromusha|gokidhasangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhasangmun眉sha|dhasangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhasangnkmun眉sha|godhasangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasangmun眉sha|gokidhasangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhasangmush毛sha|dhasangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhasangnkmush毛sha|godhasangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhasangmush毛sha|gokidhasangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasangmurosha|dhasangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasangnkmurosha|godhasangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasangmurosha|gokidhasangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhasang|dhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙s忙ng|dh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhasang|hodhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙s忙ng|hodh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhasang|hohodhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙s忙ng|hohodh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhasang|n眉dhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙s忙ng|n眉dh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhasang|n眉n眉dhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙s忙ng|n眉n眉dh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhasang|n茂dhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙s忙ng|n茂dh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhasang|n茂n茂dhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙s忙ng|n茂n茂dh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhasang|ludhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙s忙ng|ludh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhasang|luludhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙s忙ng|luludh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhasang|lidhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙s忙ng|lidh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhasang|lilidhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙s忙ng|lilidh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhasang|kodhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙s忙ng|kodh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhasang|kokodhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙s忙ng|kokodh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhasang|kedhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙s忙ng|kedh忙s忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhasang|kekedhasang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙s忙ng|kekedh忙s忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
